message:
refactor(ui): Stripe/Linear-inspired UI overhaul

Major UI/UX improvements focused on clean, minimal design:

- globals.css: Fixed typography scale (5 sizes), 4px spacing grid,
  reduced keyframes from ~70 to ~12, improved dark mode contrast
- PromptCard: Removed 3D cursor tracking/glow, simplified to CSS-only
  hover with subtle lift + shadow, reduced action buttons to 2
- Hero: Removed CharacterReveal, AnimatedCounter, staggered animations;
  single fade-in, static numbers, horizontal scroll for pills on mobile
- PromptGrid: Added xl:grid-cols-4 breakpoint for larger screens
- Nav: Simplified to 4 essential links, reduced header height h-14→h-12
- Filters: Consistent sizing (text-sm), neutral color palette

Net reduction: ~789 lines of code removed for cleaner, faster UI.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
